item.title: Cosmic Galaxy Wars now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

"The abyss of RPG awaits..."

Action RPG Cosmic Galaxy Wars is now available for PC via Steam for $19.99, publisher CHIMERA Special Agency and developer YOSHITSUNA announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

The abyss of RPG awaits—.

You won’t find another RPG like this anywhere in the world. That’s a promise.

At the start, you’ll probably ask yourself: “What on earth is this?” As you keep playing, you might be reminded of a few games from the past. But sooner or later, you’ll realize—this is unlike any RPG you’ve ever experienced.

There are no hand-holding tutorials here. The game asks you to learn by playing. Not because it’s unfriendly, but because discovery is the fun. When you uncover the path forward on your own, the catharsis is incomparable.

That is the essence—and the thrill—of this RPG.

Once again, let us repeat: the abyss of RPG awaits—.

Shooting RPG

A lone hero explores the dungeon. The hero shoots bullets through the dark halls. Dodge enemy fire. It’s an RPG, but it plays like a shooting game.

And yet, it doesn’t stop there. This is “Galactic Wars.” An experience you simply cannot understand—until you play it yourself.

A Million Floors!?

Descending into dungeons is nothing new for RPGs. Roguelike? Of course, we’ve got that.

But here… the dungeon stretches to an unbelievable 1,000,000 floors! (Yes, seriously.)

How Do You Conquer an RPG Like This…?

To clear this insane RPG, you can’t stay sane. Players must abandon all conventional thinking.

Break free from the “rules” you thought you knew about RPGs. What matters most is your ideas.

Hack the system. Conquer all one million floors.

This game is nothing less than a challenge to every gamer.

Watch a trailer below.

Main Trailer
